outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected due to negative GEX environment.
outlook.summary: Spot is trading well above structural gamma flips, indicating a bullish underlying trend. However, negative total GEX suggests potential for amplified moves. Massive Call volume concentrations below spot provide a strong magnetic floor, while the 26400 Put OI caps upside. Focus on high-volume Call strikes as dynamic support.

levels.motivazione: Highest Open Interest in the dataset (10 OI) situated above the spot price, acting as a structural resistance level.
levels.sintesiOperativa: SELL AREA: Heavy Put OI resistance

levels.motivazione: Highest Weekly Call volume (12 Vol) above the spot price, serving as a short-term resistance and volatility cap.
Significant Call volume in both Weekly (6) and Monthly (77) expiries. Confluence creates a strong magnetic support level.
Extremely high Monthly Call volume (148 Vol) just below spot. Dealers are likely defending this level aggressively to pin price.
levels.sintesiOperativa: MM DEFENSE: Strong Call volume floor

levels.motivazione: Highest 0DTE Put OI (6) aligns with the 0DTE Max Pain level, acting as a strong downside magnet for today's session.
Monthly Gamma Flip level. Represents the structural macro-equilibrium point where cumulative GEX shifts.
